description: Usui Lanka (Pvt.) Ltd, Vs Nadun Guruge, Commissioner General of Inland Revenue, before Hon. Adithya Patabendige, J.
parties: Usui Lanka (Pvt.) Ltd, Vs Nadun Guruge, Commissioner General of Inland Revenue,
keywords: Writ of Certiorari, Writ of Mandamus, Dividend Tax, Non-resident Shareholder, Novation of Contract, Excess Payment of Tax by Mistake of Law.
legistation: Article 140 of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Section 10(1) (a), Section 200,218(3) of the Inland Revenue Act No. 10 of 2006, Section 17 of the Board of Investment Law No. 4 of 1978.
